name: Starling-7B (alpha)
license: Apache-2.0 (with condition not to compete with OpenAI)
note: RLAIF fine-tune of OpenChat-3.5/Mistral-7B using the GPT-4-labeled Nectar dataset and APA policy optimization; scored 8.09 MT-Bench (GPT-4 judge) and 91.99 AlpacaEval, best 7B at release behind only GPT-4/GPT-4-Turbo.
tpsNote: Architecture-class estimate for a 7B dense model at Q4_K_M GGUF on RTX 4090; not a checkpoint-specific measurement (Mistral's GQA may run somewhat faster in practice).
